title: ImportVerilog may be non-deterministic
body: A circt/circt-tests CI run on a commit of @teqdruid found [differences in the sv-tests error statistics](https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/8660fca1b704ba6b41d458acd1073d1e0945c9c5#commitcomment-179889339) even though that commit did not touch anything related to circt-verilog. This looks like ImportVerilog may have a non-deterministic code path somewhere, for example, iteration over a hash map. Investigate this.
